fileName: GENERIC CODE SHEET TEMPLATE MAPS (not used)

fields.helpText: This field stores the name of the input template used when creating or editing code sheets.

This field stores a map of the input template in the form \'field number' T(for output transform);'global node';'piece'.  For example \1200T;VOLU;1 indicates the field number 1200 with a defined output transform, with data located on global node VOLU, piece number 1.
